summary: CV Family & Schooling census — enrichment (~20-field schema, Sonnet workers, 1 site visit + 1 search)
logs: Batch 0: enriching 40 family/schooling entities (Sonnet 4.6, 1 site visit + 1 search)...

enrichment.name: First School of the Desert - Palm Springs
enrichment.full_address: 2300 E. Racquet Club Road, Palm Springs, CA 92262
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Established 1987, multi-location regional chain, but top search results are dominated by aggregators (Yelp, Winnie, Nextdoor, MomTrusted) rather than authoritative editorial coverage.

enrichment.name: Montessori School of Palm Springs
enrichment.full_address: 3692 E Chia Rd, Palm Springs, CA 92262
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: School has operated since 1984 with 146 students and AMS membership, but its own website is unreachable, leaving discovery entirely dependent on third-party aggregators.

enrichment.name: Creative Beginnings Montessori Center
enrichment.full_address: 332 W Alejo Rd, Palm Springs, CA 92262
enrichment.enrollment_or_capacity_hint: 61 students (PK–grade 4, per aggregator; not stated on own site)
enrichment.faith_affiliation_if_stated: secular/none (located on Temple Isaiah campus but school does not claim faith affiliation)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: 25-year-old Montessori school with 61 students and a named director with 30+ years experience, but search results are dominated by aggregators (Yelp, GreatSchools, Winnie, Daycare.com); own site has no structured data to aid direct discovery.

enrichment.name: King's Schools of the Desert
enrichment.full_address: 67675 Bolero Rd, Palm Springs, CA 92264
special_programs_if_stated: NILD (National Institute for Learning Development — learning differences support)

enrichment.name: St. Theresa Catholic School
enrichment.full_address: 455 S Compadre Rd, Palm Springs, CA 92262
enrichment.license_or_accreditation_displayed: Accredited by the Western Catholic Education Association (WCEA) and co-accredited by the Western Association of Schools and Colleges (WASC)
special_programs_if_stated: Preschool / early childhood program (St. Theresa Catholic School Preschool)

enrichment.name: A Child's Place An Early Education Center
enrichment.full_address: 1534 N Palm Canyon Dr, Palm Springs, CA 92262
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Site is JavaScript-rendered and returns no content to bots; entity surfaces only through aggregators (Care.com, Winnie, Yelp, childcarecenter.us) with no own-site agent-readable presence.
enrichment._src_name: A Child's Place An Early Education Center

enrichment.name: It's A Little Scholars Childcare Center
enrichment.full_address: 3692 Chia Rd, Palm Springs, CA 92262
enrichment.license_or_accreditation_displayed: Palm Springs Facility #33846688 (Licensed by the CCLD of the CDSS)
special_programs_if_stated: Transportation from select PSUSD elementary schools
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Site surfaces clearly in top results with own domain and Yelp listing, but no Google Business Profile rich card or directory aggregator presence detected beyond Yelp.
enrichment._src_name: It's A Little Scholars Childcare Center

enrichment.name: Kiddie Kollege
enrichment.full_address: 490 Compadre Rd, Palm Springs, CA 92262
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: 65-year community institution with strong local tenure; online presence is aggregator-led rather than authority-led, understating its historical significance.

enrichment.name: Kumon Math and Reading Center of Palm Springs
enrichment.full_address: 1111 E Tahquitz Canyon Way, Palm Springs, CA 92262
enrichment.ages_grades_served: pre-K through high school (Kumon national program range)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Location surfaces only via third-party aggregators (cityof.com, yellowpages); kumon.com returns 403 to bots and no location-specific page ranks in top results.
enrichment._src_name: Kumon Math and Reading Center of Palm Springs

enrichment.name: Modelli Learning Academy
enrichment.full_address: 2150 E. Tahquitz Canyon Way, Suite 4, Palm Springs, CA 92262
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Site self-describes a long-standing local community presence serving the full Coachella Valley, but surfaces mainly through aggregators (Yelp, ChamberofCommerce) with no structured data or authoritative third-party coverage to reinforce that reputation.

enrichment.name: Kay Butler Grassroots Junior Tennis, Inc.
enrichment.full_address: Ruth Hardy Park, 700 Tamarisk Road, Palm Springs, CA 92262
enrichment.enrollment_or_capacity_hint: Birthday Sparks summer program limited to 25 students; clinics open enrollment
special_programs_if_stated: Year-round stroke analysis and match play clinics
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Well-surfaced online given size — GuideStar, RAP Foundation, Anderson Children's Foundation, USTA SoCal, and Desert Charities all index it alongside its own site; no notable gap.
enrichment._src_name: Grassroots Junior Tennis (Kay Butler Grassroots Junior Tennis, Inc.)

enrichment.name: CK Dance

enrichment.name: Desert Dance Academy
enrichment.subcategory: arts, music & performing-arts education for youth
enrichment.full_address: 34200 Cook St, Palm Desert, CA 92211
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Academy operates inside Xavier College Prep (a known Catholic high school) with community reach across the Coachella Valley, but surfaces only via its own site and a Nextdoor listing — no authoritative arts-education directories or local press coverage found.

enrichment.name: Step By Step Dance Studio
enrichment.subcategory: arts, music & performing-arts education for youth
enrichment.full_address: 933 Lawrence Crossley Rd, Palm Springs, CA 92262
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Studio established since 1981 with Chamber of Commerce listing and multi-platform presence, but own website is unreachable and results are dominated by aggregators (Yelp, Groupon, Nextdoor, Sawyer).

enrichment.name: Nickerson-Rossi Dance
enrichment.subcategory: arts, music & performing-arts education for youth
enrichment.full_address: 611 S Palm Canyon Dr, Unit #12, Palm Springs, CA
enrichment.ages_grades_served: youth all-ages; K–8 introductory; pre-professional program for committed/aspiring professional dancers
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Well-established nonprofit (13+ years, $750k+ in scholarships, Palm Springs Art Museum residency) with strong local recognition; visibility is commensurate with reputation.

enrichment.name: Palm Canyon Theatre
enrichment.subcategory: arts, music & performing-arts education for youth
enrichment.full_address: 538 N Palm Canyon Dr, Palm Springs, CA 92262
enrichment.ages_grades_served: youth all-ages (summer camp; partner references middle and high school students)
special_programs_if_stated: Kids Camp (acting, singing, dancing, stagecraft, makeup, costuming, improvisation, stage combat)
Student group ticket partnership with Anderson Children's Foundation
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Established 1997 nonprofit with broad community presence and multi-source search coverage; online visibility is proportionate to reputation.

enrichment.name: The Music School

enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Established 1990, community partnerships with PSUSD and tribal organizations, alumni with university scholarships — but surfaces only on Yelp and social profiles; no press, no directory authority links in top results.

enrichment.name: Desert Music Academy
